## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run build && npm test` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has a deterministic test (green without a running model)
- [ ] No new runtime dependency (`dependencies: {}` stays), or a written justification below
- [ ] Relative imports use the `.js` extension; code/comments in English
- [ ] Docs / README / CHANGELOG updated if user-facing
